title: Silas #4609
definition:
Silas = "woody"

 1) a Roman citizen, the companion of the apostle Paul on several of
    his missionary journeys
nasbUsage:
Definition: Silas = "woody"

 1) a Roman citizen, the companion of the apostle Paul on several of
    his missionary journeys

    NASB:  Silas, a fellow missionary of Paul:
